calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

David S. Zalob, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Shibata Floral Company.
Joi Pechardo, accountant for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No apppearance by defendants San Francisco Floral Exchange/Local Fulfillment Center, Inc. or Behrooz Ghaysari.
Defaults were entered against defendants on May 19, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 27, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Shibata Floral Company, and against the Defaulted Defendants San Francisco Floral Exchange/Local Fulfillment Center, Inc., and Behrooz Ghaysari as follows:

Damages/Principal - $17,057.95.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,461.59.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $404.50, for a total judgment in the amount of 23,924.04.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
